name: Beginners Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Put the popped popcorn in a large, 4-inch deep buttered baking pan. Keep warm in the oven.
3. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, water, butter, and salt. Stir over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Cook until the mixture reaches 250°F on a candy thermometer, stirring frequently.
5. Remove from heat. Quickly stir in vanilla.
6. Remove popcorn from the oven.
7. Pour the syrup mixture over the popcorn, stirring to mix well.
8. Form into balls. Makes approximately 8 balls.
Variations:
To make Spice Balls, substitute 1 teaspoon of powdered spice or crushed herbs for vanilla.
